title: Aadmi
subTitle: Vijay, a factory supervisor, is falsely accused and arrested for killing his family. Just when he is at his lowest point, an inspector offers to help him in return for capturing the son of a gangster.

title: Bal Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: 23rd March 1931: Shaheed
subTitle: After his mentor is killed, a freedom fighter sets out to exact revenge on an officer responsible for his mentor's death. However, he is arrested and sentenced to death for his misdeeds.

title: Baazi
subTitle: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Khoon Bhari Maang
subTitle: Widowed Aarti falls prey to Sanjay's vicious plan of getting married to him. Later, with the help of her best friend Nandini, he drowns Aarti and seizes her wealth but she survives and seeks revenge.

title: Aitraaz
subTitle: When a company chairman's trophy wife stirs up a storm in a happily married employee's life, the tumultuous winds drag all of them into an intense courtroom showdown.

title: Barood
subTitle: Jai, an honest police officer, falls in love with Neha, Mr Singhal's daughter. However, he suspects Mr Singhal to be a criminal and tries to catch him red-handed.

title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Lakshya
subTitle: Karan, an aimless young man, joins the Indian Army on a whim but backs out when he finds a soldier's life to be difficult. When this creates conflict with his girlfriend, he rejoins to make her proud.

title: Gaddaar
subTitle: A wealthy businessman's son manipulates a loyal friend into his personal schemes, but unexpected love and rising tensions threaten to unravel their lives.

title: Fateh
subTitle: Ranvir, Karan and Salim, commandos trained by Major Anand, are shattered when the latter is killed. They soon learn that a gangster, Samrat, may be responsible for his death and try to find the truth.

title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
subTitle: A rich girl, Shalini, falls in love with an orphan, Arun, after he performs the poems she wrote using a pen name. However, things take a tragic turn when Arun marries the principal's daughter, Meena.

title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
subTitle: When the good doctor Vijay is falsely accused and imprisoned, his wife and daughter, desperately seeking justice, are terrorised and slandered by the harsh eyes of the society.

title: Prem Rog
subTitle: After a series of tragedies shake Manorama's life, Devdhar, her childhood friend who falls for her, vows to make her happy. In the process, he faces the wrath of Manorama's conservative family.

title: Hitler
subTitle: An overprotective brother, who wants to keep his five sisters safe from the cruel world, faces antagonism from them after they turn against him.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Naaka Bandi
subTitle: Veera raises Raja, his foster sibling, after their parents are killed by Mangal. While Veera seeks to avenge his parents' murder, Raja's estranged uncle Kaalia arrives to instigate Raja against him.

title: Naaka Bandi
subTitle: Veera raises Raja, his foster sibling, after their parents are killed by Mangal. While Veera seeks to avenge his parents' murder, Raja's estranged uncle Kaalia arrives to instigate Raja against him.

title: Trimurti
subTitle: A wrongfully convicted policewoman expects her three children to settle scores with her enemy. But when the long-awaited moment arrives, luck does not seem to be on her side.

title: Akele Hum Akele Tum
subTitle: Two aspiring singers, Rohit and Kiran, fall in love and get married. Soon, the burden of responsibilities cripples the marriage and Kiran decides to part ways with Rohit.

title: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba
subTitle: A doctor who does not believe in Sai Baba's powers travels to Shirdi with his ill son. Soon, the doctor has to decide between Sai Baba and science to treat his ailing son.

title: Henna
subTitle: Henna, a bubbly young woman based in a village in Pakistan, sets her heart on an endearing stranger who winds up there with serious injuries and no memory of his past.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Ghayal
subTitle: Balwant Rai, a corrupt businessman, frames Ajay for the murder of his brother. Later, with no support from those close to him, Ajay takes an unlikely route to seek revenge.

title: Krantiveer
subTitle: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.

title: Aashiq
subTitle: Pooja and Chander fall in love and want to be together. However, since Pooja's alcoholic father would never approve, she decides to run away from her house but, unfortunately, lands in a brothel.
